style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 18px;">Producer</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="65" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 18px;">Co-ordinator</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="65" y="920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="4" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="500" y="1010" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="550" y="960" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;">POST /produce { key: "order_1", payload: {...} }</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="430" x="150" y="850" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">1. hash("order_1") = 184036158</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">2. Ring lookup → primary=node-d, replicas=[node-a, node-b]</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;"><br></span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">POST /store { key, payload, replicateTo: [node-a, node-b] }</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="545" x="153" y="990" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 18px;">Node-D (Primary)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="65" y="1100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="139.47" y="970" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="139" y="1100" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 18px;">Co-ordinator</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="65" y="1300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">1. messageStore["order_1"] = { payload, role: "primary" }</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">2. POST http://node-a:5000/replicate</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">3. POST http://node-b:5000/replicate</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">4. Both replicas respond: { success: true }</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">5. Return to coordinator: { replicationResults: [success, success] }</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="545" x="160" y="1180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="10" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="139.94" y="1150" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="139.47" y="1280" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 18px;">Producer prints result</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="230" x="65" y="1440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="139.47" y="1350" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="140" y="1440" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Return to producer: { primary: "node-d", replicas: [...], RepStatus: success }</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="640" x="160" y="1380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
